name: Hot Crab Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all of the ingredients together in a large bowl (not in a blender or food processor).
2. Transfer the mixture to a baking dish.
3. Top with either sliced almonds or paprika, if desired.
4. Bake in an oven preheated to 375°F for 15 minutes.
5. Serve with chips.
